title: nephrodium miquelianum
intro: Nephrodium miquelianum, also known as the Miquel's maidenhair fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Nephrodium miquelianum include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve respiratory function, and act as an antibacterial agent. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often made into tea, tincture, or infused into oil for use in treating various health conditions.
